sp_credentials.title: SP Services Login (Optional)
sp_credentials.description: Enter your SP Services account credentials to enable household electricity and water usage sensors. Leave both fields empty to skip.

sp_otp.title: SP Services OTP
sp_otp.description: An SMS one-time password has been sent to {phone}. Enter it below.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SP Services
reauth_confirm.description: Your SP Services session has expired. Please log in again.

reauth_otp.title: SP Services OTP
reauth_otp.description: An SMS one-time password has been sent to {phone}. Enter it below.

error.name_too_long: Name must be 64 characters or fewer.
error.sp_credentials_incomplete: Please provide both username and password, or leave both empty to skip.
error.sp_cannot_connect: Could not connect to SP Services. Check your network and try again.
error.sp_invalid_otp: Invalid or expired OTP. Please try again.
